title: DA: Cop covered bodycam to snap nude prisoners on his iPhone—but other cams caught him
summary: Further phone searches showed, investigators say, that Gaffney had shared one image with “two stored contacts” and the other with “twelve contacts from his personal device on four different dates.” Gaffney had already sat for a voluntary interview about the case with…
